prompt:
Use case: social ad
Primary request: introduce Intima-Date as more than a prompt app, with a consent-first premium feel
Scene/background: dark obsidian void with soft particle haze, floating portal card and consent UI
Subject: glass phone screen showing warning screen transitioning into consent screen
Action: beat 1 (0-2s) portal warning card glows into view; beat 2 (2-5s) consent screen replaces it with a smooth UI morph; beat 3 (5-8s) headline locks center as the camera gently pushes in
Camera: straight-on medium close-up, 50mm, slow push-in
Lighting/mood: premium, intimate, controlled, PG-safe
Color palette: obsidian black, neon rose, electric blue, warm gold
Style/format: polished startup ad, crisp UI, shallow depth of field
Audio: soft ambient synth pulse, clean confident voiceover
Text (verbatim): "Not just prompts.", "Consent first."
Dialogue:
<dialogue>
- Narrator: "Most connection apps stop at prompts. Intima-Date turns the whole night into a two-player game."
</dialogue>
Constraints: app UI only; no real people; no physical contact; keep text centered and readable
Avoid: flicker, jitter, UI distortion, fast camera moves

Use case: social ad
Primary request: show the share-code join flow and the pre-game activity negotiation as the product differentiator
Scene/background: same obsidian void, two floating phones side by side with subtle depth separation
Subject: one phone generating a game code, the second phone joining, then both transitioning into activity edit and review screens
Action: beat 1 (0-2s) first phone reveals a share code with a copy button; beat 2 (2-4s) second phone enters the code and joins; beat 3 (4-8s) activity rows animate with edits, deletions, additions, and approval highlights
Camera: locked-off frontal composition with a slight lateral slide
Lighting/mood: confident, high-trust, product-led
Color palette: obsidian black, neon rose, electric blue, warm gold
Style/format: premium UI showcase, minimal but dramatic
Audio: continuing ambient pulse, clear voiceover
Text (verbatim): "Share code.", "Edit. Review. Approve."
Dialogue:
<dialogue>
- Narrator: "One code brings your partner in. Before anyone plays, you build the experience together."
</dialogue>
Constraints: show only supported product flow; highlight edit, review, approve states; no unsupported metrics or claims
Avoid: busy backgrounds, unreadable UI, exaggerated motion

Use case: social ad
Primary request: reveal the gameplay loop and end on one clear CTA
Scene/background: same obsidian studio, floating gameboard with luminous dice area and holographic cards
Subject: 3D die, prompt card, token counters, movement card flash, activity shop card, coin flip outcome card
Action: beat 1 (0-2s) 3D die rolls and lands dramatically; beat 2 (2-5s) prompt card rises, tokens pulse, movement card flashes holographically; beat 3 (5-8s) activity card is selected, a coin flips, and the final CTA card locks on screen
Camera: medium-wide hero shot, gentle orbit into a centered finish
Lighting/mood: energetic, premium, cinematic
Color palette: obsidian black, neon rose, electric blue, warm gold
Style/format: high-end product trailer, glossy reflections, controlled UI motion
Audio: ambient synth pulse swells slightly, final voiceover line lands with the CTA
Text (verbatim): "Structured connection.", "Start a game. Share the code."
Dialogue:
<dialogue>
- Narrator: "Then the board comes alive with prompts, tokens, movement cards, and a favor-or-challenge finish. Start a game. Share the code."
</dialogue>
Constraints: keep it PG-safe; no explicit activities shown; final CTA only once at the end
Avoid: chaotic motion, illegible text, extra claims, human faces
